name: Candace Telegram BUSINESS (replies as the real account via a bot)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { p_bot: 'candace_telegram', p_platform: 'telegram', p_username: $json.username, p_display: $json.display, p_user_msg: $json.msg, p_window: 12 } }}

={{ { bot_id: $json.bot_id, fan_id: $json.fan_id, type: 'dm_queued', payload: { platform: 'telegram', username: $json.username, display: $json.display, msg: $json.msg, msg_count: $json.myCount, delay_sec: $json.delaySec, queued_at: $json.queued_at, scheduled_for: $json.scheduled_for, resume_url: $execution.resumeUrl } } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('DB: ingest').first().json || {};
const recent = Array.isArray(ctx.recent) ? ctx.recent : [];
const last = recent.length ? recent[recent.length - 1].content : '';
const history = recent.slice(-7).map(function (t) { return (t.role === 'user' ? 'him: ' : 'her: ') + t.content; }).join('\n');
const sys = [
'you are a fast silent classifier for a flirty 21yo female texting persona named candace, talking to a man one on one on her private telegram. she is the prize: cool, hard to get, never eager. her job here is NOT selling and NOT sending him anywhere. her job is to make him fall for her and keep coming back: build attachment, make him feel chosen, leave him craving the next reply. you never write her reply. you output one json object only, nothing else.',
'read his latest message and the recent context, then output exactly this json:',
'{',
'"archetype": one of [sweet, cocky, shy, provider, submissive, lowffort, hostile, normal],',
'"intent": one of [greeting, compliment, question_about_her, question_other, sexual, bot_test, misses_her, wants_to_meet, wants_personal_info, vulnerable, boring, insult, normal],',
'"effort": one of [low, medium, high],',
'"ask_back": boolean. DEFAULT false. true only about one in five, never if his last reply was a question, never if he is low effort, never on a compliment or question_about_her.',
'"directive": a short specific instruction, max 22 words, for how candace plays THIS reply. she is the prize, never gushes, never over shares, never interviews him. lean on retention: leave him wanting more, use what she remembers about him, make him feel chosen.',
'}',
'directive guidance by case:',
'- compliment: receive it coolly and confidently, a little smug, never gush.',
'- question_about_her: brief and coy, a crumb not a paragraph, a small personal share is ok since this is her private space, no interview back.',
'- misses_her or cant stop thinking about you: stay cool and a little pleased, reward it lightly, never match his eagerness, make it land but he still has to chase.',
'- low effort or greeting with nothing behind it: short flat reply, give less.',
'- cocky or flexing: tease, act unimpressed, make him work.',
'- submissive or asks to be owned: deny and make him earn it, cool and in control.',
'- vulnerable or had a bad day: a little real warmth, draw him out gently, this is the moment she leans in.',
'- bot_test: confident playful deflection.',
'- wants_to_meet or wants_personal_info: coy non answer, she does not give it up.',
'- insult or hostile: unbothered amused one liner, never defensive.'
].join('\n');
const usr = 'his latest message: ' + (last || '(empty or sticker)') + '\nrecent conversation oldest first:\n' + (history || '(none)') + '\noutput the json now.';
return [{ json: { classifyMessages: [{ role: 'system', content: sys }, { role: 'user', content: usr }] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 160, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: $json.classifyMessages } }}
={{ { model: $json.model, temperature: 1, max_tokens: 300, frequency_penalty: 0.5, presence_penalty: 0.4, messages: $json.messages } }}
={{ { model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 600, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: $json.profileMessages } }}

={{ { bot_id: $('Set Delay').first().json.bot_id, fan_id: $('Set Delay').first().json.fan_id, type: 'dm_sent', payload: { platform: 'telegram', username: $('Set Delay').first().json.username, msg_count: $('Set Delay').first().json.myCount, reply: $('Format Reply').first().json.reply, sent_at: $now.toISO() } } }}
